PRODUCT HEADER SHOULD NOT SURVIVE MAIN MODE
DOCUMENTATION TREE SHOULD NOT SURVIVE MAIN MODE

Configuration Guide

This guide explains the configuration contract in enough detail for an article extractor to recognize the central documentation region.

Settings

output
Controls the destination used for generated Markdown documents.
{"output": "guide.md", "enabled": true}
SettingDefault
enabledtrue

License

The license section is intentional documentation, not a footer marker.

SITE FOOTER SHOULD NOT SURVIVE MAIN MODE
